posts.author: atishay_jain1
posts.text: ThePrint – 6 May 26 'Make in India' gets a radar lock, India-Israel joint venture plant breaks... ELTX Systems aims to support armed forces programmes, transfer knowledge & advance technologies for high-end defence systems. Est. reading time: 2 minutes I used to consider DCX as low margin Defence offset partner. But this Radar JV needs to be studied.
